summary: Iteration 8 testing completed successfully. All new features verified: Sidebar restructured into 4 sections, Super Admin tenant management, CRM deals deduplication fix, Chatwoot webhook creates leads with BOT tag, Module toggle controls sidebar visibility, Analytics date filters for Leads and CRM, Perdidas metric in CRM analytics, Leads stats summary cards.
passed_tests: Login with admin@spectraflow.com / Admin123! (super_admin role)
Sidebar has 4 sections: SPECTRA PROSPECCION (Buscador, Flow IA), LEADS (Leads), SPECTRA EMAIL MARKETING (Email Marketing, Campanas, Plantillas), SPECTRA CRM (Spectra CRM)
Super Admin section visible in sidebar for super_admin role
GET /api/admin/tenants returns list of tenants with user_count, lead_count, contact_count
POST /api/admin/tenants creates new tenant with admin user and integration configs
PUT /api/admin/tenants/{id} updates tenant plan, price, modules, active status
POST /api/crm/deals with existing contact_id UPDATES existing deal (not duplicate)
POST /api/webhooks/chatwoot/lead creates lead in leads collection with tags=['bot'] and source='bot'
GET /api/leads/stats returns stats by status (scored, rejected, approved, contacted, sent_to_crm)
GET /api/analytics?period=month filters leads by date
GET /api/analytics?period=week filters leads by week
GET /api/analytics?period=quarter filters leads by quarter
GET /api/crm/stats?period=quarter filters CRM data by date
GET /api/crm/stats returns Perdidas metric (stage_counts.perdido + lost_value)
GET /api/crm/stats returns all pipeline stages (nuevo, contactado, propuesta, negociacion, ganado, perdido)
GET /api/tenant/modules returns modules including 'leads' key
PUT /api/tenant/modules updates module toggles
Operator role correctly denied access to admin endpoints (403)
/admin/tenants page loads and shows tenant table with all columns
Analytics page has date filter dropdowns for Leads and CRM tabs
Leads page shows stats summary cards (Calificados, Rechazados, Aprobados, Total)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Tenant_* and TEST_Update_* tenants for testing (via backend tests), TEST_ChatwootLead_* lead via webhook test, TEST_DealDupe_* contact for deduplication test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 features all working: 1) Sidebar restructured into 4 sections (Spectra Prospeccion, Leads, Spectra Email Marketing, Spectra CRM) with Super Admin section for super_admin role, 2) Tenant management endpoints (GET/POST/PUT /api/admin/tenants) with user_count, lead_count, contact_count, 3) CRM deals deduplication - POST /api/crm/deals checks for existing deal by contact_id and updates instead of creating duplicate, 4) Chatwoot webhook (/api/webhooks/chatwoot/lead) creates leads with source='bot' and tags=['bot'], 5) Module toggle (/api/tenant/modules) controls sidebar visibility, 6) Analytics date filters (period=week|month|quarter) for both /api/analytics and /api/crm/stats, 7) Perdidas metric in CRM stats (stage_counts.perdido + lost_value), 8) Leads stats summary cards on Leads page

mocked_apis.Prospect job leads: Demo mode generates realistic Argentine business data

crm_deals_deduplication.behavior: Updates existing deal if contact_id already has a deal, instead of creating duplicate

chatwoot_webhook.feature: Chatwoot webhook creates leads with BOT tag

analytics_date_filters.feature: Analytics date filters for Leads and CRM
analytics_date_filters.ui_location: Analytics page - Leads tab and CRM tab
